sentences.arabic: تَسْتَخْدِمُ مُدُنٌ عَرَبِيَّةٌ كَثِيرَةٌ التِّقْنِيَّةَ الْحَدِيثَةَ لِلتَّطْوِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi arapski gradovi koriste modernu tehnologiju za razvoj.
sentences.translationEn: Many Arab cities use modern technology for development.

sentences.arabic: تَبْنِي دُبَيُّ وَالرِّيَاضُ مُدُنًا ذَكِيَّةً لِلْمُسْتَقْبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Dubai i Rijad grade pametne gradove za budućnost.
sentences.translationEn: Dubai and Riyadh are building smart cities for the future.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الِابْتِكَارَاتُ تَخْلُقُ فُرَصًا جَدِيدَةً لِلشَّبَابِ.
sentences.translation: Ove inovacije stvaraju nove prilike za mlade ljude.
sentences.translationEn: These innovations create new opportunities for young people.
